name: @iris/store-do
description: Iris Cloudflare/edge (Durable Objects) host adapter — a StateStore + Scheduler over a narrow DoStorage abstraction (cold-per-turn isolate, DO-alarm-backed durable timer) enforcing the SAME CAS/fencing/hwm/snapshot invariants as the sqlite/fs stores. Install-free: tested against FakeDoStorage; the real isolate is a manual smoke. No @cloudflare/* import.
